testsuite.name: Flujo de compra E2E en Demoblaze

testcase.name: Compra exitosa de dos productos

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for alert to be present (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.10.0', revision: 'c14d967899' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.18' Driver info: net.thucydides.core.webdriver.DevToolsWebDriverFacade
